description: Critical path services are being evicted during node memory pressure due to incorrect Kubernetes Quality of Service (QoS) classes. A post-mortem identified three deployments with incorrect QoS tiering: `auth-service`, `payment-api`, and `data-warehouse-sync`. Reconfigure the resource requests and limits for these deployments in the 'local' cluster to match the QoS policy at `/home/ga/Desktop/qos_policy.md`. Ensure all pods reach the `Running` state with the correct `.status.qosClass`. Login to Rancher at https://localhost (admin / Admin12345678!).
